name: nymble
flavor_texts: It has its third set of legs folded up. When it’s in a tough spot, this Pokémon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs.
It’s highly skilled at a fighting style in which it uses its jumping capabilities to dodge incoming attacks while also dealing damage to opponents.
text: Nymble is the Grasshopper Pokémon. It is a bug-type Pokémon. Abilities: swarm, tinted-lens (hidden). Base stats — HP: 33, Attack: 46, Defense: 40, Sp. Atk: 21, Sp. Def: 25, Speed: 45. Evolution line: nymble → lokix. Lore: It has its third set of legs folded up. When it’s in a tough spot, this Pokémon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs. It’s highly skilled at a fighting style in which it uses its jumping capabilities to dodge incoming attacks while also dealing damage to opponents.
